commands_run: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); mkdir -p "$tmpdir/api/config"; cp api/config/api.json "$tmpdir/api/config/api.json"; TARGET_SHA=0123456789abcdef REPO_DIR="$tmpdir" python3 - <<'PY' ... PY; jq -e --arg sha 0123456789abcdef '.deployed_sha == $sha and .web.deployed_sha == $sha and .web.updated_at == $sha' "$tmpdir/api/config/api.json" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
failure_reason: Strict public deploy verification showed API SHA parity was correct but the web health proxy still reported deployed_sha=unknown. Hostinger deploys now stamp the target SHA into api/config/api.json before rebuilding so the Next health proxy can expose web SHA parity.

commands: tmpdir=$(mktemp -d); mkdir -p "$tmpdir/api/config"; cp api/config/api.json "$tmpdir/api/config/api.json"; TARGET_SHA=0123456789abcdef REPO_DIR="$tmpdir" python3 - <<'PY' ... PY; jq -e --arg sha 0123456789abcdef '.deployed_sha == $sha and .web.deployed_sha == $sha and .web.updated_at == $sha' "$tmpdir/api/config/api.json" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmpdir"
